name: Freelancer Tools
description: Free client-side tools for freelancers — contracts, proposals, NDAs, rate calculators, quotes, and change orders. No signup, no subscription.

tools.name: Freelance Contract Generator
tools.description: Free freelance contract template & independent contractor agreement — scope, payment, IP, confidentiality, PDF download.

tools.name: Freelance Proposal Generator
tools.description: Build a client proposal with summary, scope, timeline, pricing, and about section — export PDF.

tools.name: NDA Generator
tools.description: Generate a one-way or mutual non-disclosure agreement and download it as a PDF.

tools.name: Freelance Rate Calculator
tools.description: Calculate a sustainable hourly rate from income goals, expenses, billable hours, and profit margin.

tools.name: Project Quote Calculator
tools.description: Turn hours, rate, expenses, and margin into a clear project quote with cost breakdown.

tools.name: Late Payment Fee Calculator
tools.description: Calculate late fees on overdue invoices with flat or monthly percentage rates.

tools.name: Break-Even Calculator
tools.description: Find how many projects or hours you need each month to cover fixed costs.

tools.name: Self-Employment Tax Calculator
tools.description: Estimate US self-employment tax or Pakistan income tax on freelance net income — for planning only.

tools.name: Client Onboarding Form Generator
tools.description: Generate a client intake questionnaire as a printable PDF or downloadable HTML form.

tools.name: Scope Change Order Generator
tools.description: Document out-of-scope work with added cost and time — protect yourself with a PDF change order.

tools.name: Freelance Email Templates Generator
tools.description: Generate personalized freelance emails for cold pitches, follow-ups, invoice reminders, retainers, testimonials, and scope changes.
